originalBehavior: The published lesson boots the Learning Synths shell and introduces ADSR shaping through a press-and-hold envelope scene.
localStatus: The local route keeps that envelope lesson shell and ADSR runtime under the route tree while moving provenance to the shared footer.
notes: The archive preserves the published envelope scenes instead of rebuilding them in a custom synth teaching page.
Local chapter links are rewritten after mount so the shipped synth family stays internally navigable.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies local script loading and the ADSR interaction path on the shipped route.
The public route keeps footer-only provenance and strips the upstream lesson shell from the body.

originalBehavior: The published lesson relies on shared Learning Synths fonts, text payloads, RNBO patch data, and lesson WAV files around the ADSR scene.
localStatus: The local route archives that shared inventory under its own tree so the envelope lesson can run without remote media dependencies.
notes: The archived inventory matches the rest of the shipped Learning Synths batch.
Route-local assets stay on relative paths for GitHub Pages subpath hosting.
evidence: Music smoke coverage asserts the expected local asset counts before the ADSR interaction checks begin.
The no-remote-playable-media smoke guard stays clean after lesson boot and interaction.

originalBehavior: The published lesson redraws the ADSR envelope as attack, decay, sustain, and release change, and it lets users hold and release notes against that shape.
localStatus: The local route keeps the ADSR redraw and held-note path while serving the lesson entirely from archived assets.
notes: The envelope shape scene is treated as parity-critical because it is the clearest demonstration in the lesson.
The route keeps the published chapter shell instead of condensing the lesson into a single control card.
evidence: Music smoke coverage verifies the ADSR envelope path redraws and that the route can hold a synth note after parameter changes.
Responsive checks keep the envelope lesson usable on narrow viewports under the local archive shell.
